Purchased from samsung online store.My review will help other customers to valuate the product.Review based on 3 weeks of usage.Battery: Device comes with 5000 mah.Power with stands for one day on over all usage with 4g internet.Charger: 15 w.It takes 2hr long for full charge.Good battery back up for 100% charge.Camera:I m not a pro.It is okay for samsung mid range device.Processor:No idea on snap dragon vs samsung processor.I don't find any issues on multitasking.Screen: smooth as butter and vedio resolutions are good.Finally A31 is good for commercial users.Vast storage and enough features.

Writing after 3 months of use, the phone has slowed down quiet a bit (already slow processor( media tek not exynos) and usually if you clear the RAM frequently the maximum free RAM for apps would be 3GB. The phone is bulky and gives a feeling that you are holding a cheap phone. The fingerprint scanner is very slow, have to wait for 3 seconds for it to scan and the finger should be aligned perfectly for it to work( 5 years old iPhone 6 has a better fingerprint scanner ). They created hype because of the 5000 mAh battery but it doesn’t last any longer than a old phone with 3000 mAh( Lasts the same as oneplus 5t). Camera is ok but no 4K video recording and display is good. But overall the phone is not worth the money you spend. The apps take 5 to 6 seconds to load and it is painfully slow. If you want a decently fast phone then this is something you should not consider at all. Face recognition is not fast nor slow just ok. The geekbench 5 score is 350 for single core and 1100 for multi core.

Review Title: Not about product but the Amazon service
Review Body: I had an old ph to exchange with this Samsung A31 new ph, but the delivery agent rejected my ph, though there is no dent in the screen or ph and ph was working. The only issue the delivery agent was pointing that there is some small line visible inside the screen. Inspite of telling him that other conditions are matching hence you should at least give some exchange value as per other features. Unfortunately the delivery agent refused to take the old ph as suggested by his supervisor. I raise this issue with the amazon service and they assured that, again they will try the delivery. But to my surprise, I could see refund has been issued for the ph without even taking my concern for cancellation. So it seems, there is no meaning in talking to Amazon agent. Ultimately individuals time and money get wasted. I never expected as I always tell others that Amazon at least have professionalism as compared to Flipkart and other services. But now onwards I have to again rethink about the same.

This is an honest review...If you are a busy person who doesn't use phone often want a long lasting phone then I would recommend this..The camera is not too good according to the price..At times it lags a lot..And especially if you play games too often or if you are a gamer then I would say no because it lags a lot while playing and you get only 40 fps max..and after playing  for 1 or 1:30 hours there is a huge frame drop..so you would never enjoy  playing games in this phone..there are many phones which have  better performance and are cheaper..These were my honest reviews!

Review Title: If you want a multimedia phone with casual gaming go for this
Review Body: I bought the phone for 19999 , and to be honest it's a bit overpriced 18 k would have been fine. The screen , battery , camera are great and are the highlights of this phone. The camera performance is good, it clicks good quality shots with perfect dynamic range and colors only issue in camera is that it lacks basic features like slomo time-lapse which even 10k phones give these days. When it comes to performance where many people criticise this phone, i would like to tell my honest user experience, in normal usage there's no issue , I do multitasking , some small video editing , casual gaming and they work perfectly fine without lags. I played call of duty in medium settings and it worked fine. After playing 2 hours this phone becomes a bit hot.
